description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk monument featuring a sculpted bust of a man at its apex. The obelisk rises from a broad, tiered rectangular base, which appears to be made of weathered stone with visible discoloration and moss stains. The front face of the obelisk displays an inscription, likely commemorative, engraved in a formal serif font. The bust is detailed, showing facial features, hair, and clothing, and is integrated seamlessly with the top of the obelisk. The sides and rear of the obelisk are plain, with no visible ornamentation or text. The overall appearance suggests a memorial or tribute, commonly found in parks or public squares.
description: A tall stone obelisk monument with a sculpted bust on top and an engraved inscription on the front, set on a tiered rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bust, engraved inscription, and the tiered base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain, sloped surface and profile of the bust.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the unadorned back of the obelisk and the bust's back.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible weathering and the bust's profile.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription on the front face of the obelisk, below the bust, in a formal serif font. The text is partially legible and appears to be in English, commemorating an individual named 'LABOR'.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the sculpted bust of a man at the top of the obelisk; no additional carvings or decorative motifs are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, tiered rectangular platform made of stone, with visible weathering and discoloration. It consists of multiple stacked layers, each slightly smaller than the one below, providing stability and visual prominence.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is formed by the sculpted bust, which is detailed and realistic, depicting a man's head and upper torso. There are no additional decorations or pointed features.
